# mgc_container_registry_scan_vulnerabilities (Data Source)

Returns the list of vulnerabilities found in a Container Registry image scan.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scan_id` (String) ID of the scan whose vulnerabilities will be listed

### Read-Only

- `vulnerabilities` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vulnerabilities))

<a id="nestedatt--vulnerabilities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vulnerabilities`

Read-Only:

- `current_version` (String)
- `cve_id` (String)
- `cvss` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vulnerabilities--cvss))
- `description` (String)
- `fixable` (Boolean)
- `fixed_version` (String)
- `is_allowlisted` (Boolean)
- `links` (List of String)
- `package_name` (String)
- `severity` (String)
- `target_path` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--vulnerabilities--cvss"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vulnerabilities.cvss`

Read-Only:

- `by_source` (Map of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--vulnerabilities--cvss--by_source))
- `max` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--vulnerabilities--cvss--max))
- `preferred` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--vulnerabilities--cvss--preferred))

<a id="nestedobjatt--vulnerabilities--cvss--by_source"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vulnerabilities.cvss.by_source`

Read-Only:

- `score` (Number)
- `vector` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--vulnerabilities--cvss--max"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vulnerabilities.cvss.max`

Read-Only:

- `score` (Number)
- `source` (String)
- `vector` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--vulnerabilities--cvss--preferred"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vulnerabilities.cvss.preferred`

Read-Only:

- `score` (Number)
- `vector` (String)
